Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiffs 1st Set Of Form Interrogatories, 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories, 1st Request For Admissions, 1st Request For Production Of Documents & For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Scott A. Gursky, Esq. of the Law Offices of Scott A. Gursky, Tel. No. 415.398.0298, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Andrew J. Kozlow, Esq. of Ericksen Arbuthnot, Tel. No. 510.832.7770, appearing for the Defendants.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Rebecca L. Woodson.

Prior to the matter being called, counsel confer outside the presence of the Court. Matter passed.

Matter called. At the conclusion of discussions, the parties report that the matter has resolved/settled. A proposed order will be submitted to Judge Pro Tem Rebecca L. Woodson for review and signature on Plaintiff Cintas Corporation No. 2's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Further Responses To Plaintiffs 1st Set Of Form Interrogatories, 1st Set Of Special Interrogatories, 1st Request For Admissions, 1st Request For Production Of Documents & For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions.

Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca L. Woodson, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported.
